title: jacea × extranea
intro: Jacea × extranea, also known as hybrid sweet cicely, is a perennial herb that belongs to the carrot family (Apiaceae) and is a cross between Jacea bulbosa and Angelica archangelica. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, such as indigestion and bloating, due to its carminative and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Jacea × extranea include its potential to soothe stomach problems, alleviate nausea, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Jacea × extranea include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
